at navigating complex systems, driving cross-functional collaboration, and
for transforming ambiguous problems into elegant, high-impact solutions that
ing excellence, system design, and delivering measurable business value.
balance usability with technical depth. Relentlessly focused on engineer-

experience.description:
Modularized X-ray & CT processing into microservices, reducing Bazel >
to accelerate builds and releases by 40%.
Engineered real-time, operational-level database sync with complex >
Key Resolution Algorithm from 100 on-prem systems to cloud.
Optimized database performance maintaining CPU under 50% by >
EXPLAIN plans, minimizing MultiXact and buffer waits, and implement-
ing dynamic partitioning, saving $20K in infra costs
Built an in-house translation service using Django and Vite.js, deployed on >
Vercel, saving $10K annually in localization costs with Zero Downtime.
Customized open-source Metabase in Clojure with i18n configs and APIs to >
enable internationalization across 8 languages.
Developed an FSM-based interface enabling interactive user workflows with >
with configurable, event-driven transitions and automated actions.
Coded Infrastrucure as Code IaC using aws-cdk which reduced >
time by 50% across 8 regions and 5 microservices.
Led a team of 4, mentored junior developers, and designed and streamlined >
the interview process for SRE and SDE roles to improve hiring efficiency.
Created small LLM Agents with RAG to search with internal code and >
using vector database and AWS Bedrock.

Built an internal provider directory by web-scraping U.S. doctor data from >
20 insurer sites using Selenium, Python, and Tor for seamless IP rotation.
Accelerated processing of 1M records from 2 days to 3 hours using >
on Hadoop clusters.
Improved data quality by identifying and removing 89K anomalous >
in the Georgia market, enhancing final client report accuracy.
Led 20 sales POCs, securing 5 wins and 1 full-scale contract for >
data validation.

Rewritten, optimized, & organized 500 complex SQL queries to generate >
reliable datasets & dashboards for business intelligence & reporting.

Constructed AgglomerativeClustering models to segment student groups >
for Randomized Control Trials, enabling targeted interventions.
Automated stakeholder reporting by generating interactive HTML reports >
from student responses using Python, improving transparency & efficiency.
